sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Indian equity markets' pain to worsen as economy, corporate profits slow - ETCFO
feed.summary: Indian equity markets have fallen by around 13% since September due to a slowdown in corporate earnings growth and a significant withdrawal of foreign investments. This trend is expected to continue as India's economic growth slows and company profits remain under pressure.
